---
title: "Henderson Vo"
toc: false
image: images/headshot.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/hendersonvo
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/henderson-vo-a1b712275
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:hendersonvo@ucsb.edu
lightbox: 
  css-class: "styles"
---

### Welcome!

My name is Henderson and I'm happy you're here! This website is meant to act as a personal portfolio. Feel free to browse and learn more about my work.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

I am currently studying at UC Santa Barbara to earn my bachelor's in Environmental Studies and Statistics & Data Science.

In September 2025, I joined the [Bren-Environmental Studies Fellows](https://bren.ucsb.edu/undergrad-mentoring/bren-es-fellows-program/bren-es-fellows/henderson-vo) program. I also worked in Dr. Kelly Caylor's [Water, Vegetation, & Society (WAVES) Lab](https://www.waveslab.org/) in the Bren School of Environmental Science and Management.

My research interests involve climate change, landscape ecology, and ecosystem resilience. If you would like to connect, feel free to reach out via email.
